text.title: C# Clean Architecture + CQRS Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the domain have ≥3 aggregate roots with non-CRUD business rules?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — use `csharp-dotnet` umbrella; Clean Architecture is overhead for shallow CRUD
skip-this-methodology — Minimal API + direct DbContext fits Lambda/Functions; layering adds cold-start cost

branch.question: Does business behaviour live on Domain entities (not handlers)?

conclusion.verdict: move rules from handlers onto entity methods before scaffolding more handlers

branch.question: Are cross-aggregate domain events dispatched inline inside SaveChangesAsync?

conclusion.verdict: install MassTransit Outbox + relay; persist event rows in same transaction
apply remaining rules — one-command-per-folder, FluentValidation on Commands, NetArchTest fitness in CI

text.example: aggregates=4 → cold_start_budget=high → behaviour_on_entities=true → inline_dispatch=false → apply remaining rules → FluentValidation pipeline + NetArchTest assertions in CI.
